---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
###############################################################################
##  Gallus gallus ID‑mapping helper for ExpressAnalyst / iDEP / DAVID
##  (c) 2025  Galen O’Shea‑Stone
##  v1.6  – export set now includes:
##           • counts_entrez.csv            (Entrez‑keyed counts)
##           • counts_symbol.csv            (Gene‑symbol‑keyed counts)
##           • id_map_symbol_to_entrez.tsv  (Symbol ↔ Entrez custom library)
##           • id_map_full.tsv              (Ensembl ↔ Entrez ↔ Symbol map)
##           • counts_with_full_map.csv     (original counts + full ID map)
###############################################################################

## 1  PACKAGES ---------------------------------------------------------------
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
  install.packages("BiocManager")

pkgs <- c("biomaRt", "dplyr", "readr", "stringr", "tidyr", "purrr", "gprofiler2")
for (p in pkgs) if (!requireNamespace(p, quietly = TRUE)) BiocManager::install(p, ask = FALSE)

lapply(pkgs, library, character.only = TRUE)

## 2  USER INPUT -------------------------------------------------------------
infile  <- "ExpAnalyst_format.csv"      # raw counts file

## 3  READ & PRE‑CLEAN -------------------------------------------------------
message("Reading count matrix …")
counts_raw <- read_csv(infile, show_col_types = FALSE)
id_col <- colnames(counts_raw)[1]

counts <- counts_raw %>%
  filter(!str_detect(.data[[id_col]], "^(ERCC|__|#)")) %>%
  mutate({{id_col}} := str_remove(.data[[id_col]], "\\.\\d+$"),
         {{id_col}} := str_replace(.data[[id_col]], "^ENSGALT(\\d{9})$", "ENSGALG\\1"))

## 4  CONNECT TO Ensembl -----------------------------------------------------
message("Connecting to Ensembl …")
mart <- tryCatch(useEnsembl("genes", "ggallus_gene_ensembl", mirror = "useast"),
                 error = function(e) {
                   message("Mirror down; switching to default …");
                   useEnsembl("genes", "ggallus_gene_ensembl")
                 })

## 5  PRIMARY MAPPING --------------------------------------------------------
map_tbl <- getBM(attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "entrezgene_id", "external_gene_name"),
                 filters = "ensembl_gene_id", values = counts[[id_col]], mart = mart) %>%
  rename(!!id_col := ensembl_gene_id, ENTREZ_ID = entrezgene_id, GENE_SYM = external_gene_name) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character)) %>% distinct()

## 5b  LEGACY ENSEMBL 104 RESCUE -------------------------------------------
unmapped <- setdiff(counts[[id_col]], map_tbl[[id_col]])
if (length(unmapped)) {
  legacy_mart <- useEnsembl("genes", "ggallus_gene_ensembl", version = 104)
  legacy_map <- getBM(attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "entrezgene_id", "external_gene_name"),
                      filters = "ensembl_gene_id", values = unmapped, mart = legacy_mart) %>%
    rename(!!id_col := ensembl_gene_id, ENTREZ_ID = entrezgene_id, GENE_SYM = external_gene_name) %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), as.character)) %>% distinct()
  map_tbl <- bind_rows(map_tbl, legacy_map) %>% distinct()
  message("+", nrow(legacy_map), " IDs rescued via Ensembl 104")
}

## 5c  g:Profiler RESCUE (chunked + retry) ----------------------------------
still_unmapped <- setdiff(counts[[id_col]], map_tbl[[id_col]])
if (length(still_unmapped)) {
  safe_convert <- function(ids) {
    for (i in 1:3) {
      res <- tryCatch(gconvert(query = ids, organism = "ggallus", target = c("ENTREZGENE_ACC", "SYMBOL"), mthreshold = Inf, filter_na = TRUE), error = identity)
      if (!inherits(res, "error")) return(res)
      Sys.sleep(2 ^ i)
    }
    NULL
  }
  chunks <- split(still_unmapped, ceiling(seq_along(still_unmapped)/1000))
  gp_tbl <- purrr::map(chunks, safe_convert) %>% purrr::compact() %>% bind_rows()
  if (nrow(gp_tbl)) {
    gp_tbl <- gp_tbl %>% transmute(!!id_col := input, ENTREZ_ID = as.character(target), GENE_SYM = name)
    map_tbl <- bind_rows(map_tbl, gp_tbl) %>% distinct()
    message("+", nrow(gp_tbl), " IDs rescued via g:Profiler")
  }
}

## 6  MERGE COUNTS & COLLAPSE ----------------------------------------------
counts_mapped <- left_join(counts, map_tbl, by = id_col) %>% relocate(ENTREZ_ID, .before = 1)

n_total  <- nrow(counts)
n_mapped <- sum(!is.na(counts_mapped$ENTREZ_ID))
message("Mapped ", n_mapped, " / ", n_total, " rows (", round(n_mapped/n_total*100,1), " %).")

counts_ok <- counts_mapped %>% filter(!is.na(ENTREZ_ID)) %>%
  group_by(ENTREZ_ID) %>% summarise(across(where(is.numeric), sum), .groups = "drop")

## 7  EXPORTS FOR ExpressAnalyst & Downstream -------------------------------
# 7a  Entrez‑keyed counts ----------------------------------------------------
write_csv(counts_ok %>% select(ENTREZ_ID, where(is.numeric)), "counts_entrez.csv")

# 7b  Symbol‑keyed counts ----------------------------------------------------
lookup_sym <- map_tbl %>% filter(!is.na(GENE_SYM) & GENE_SYM != "") %>% distinct(GENE_SYM, ENTREZ_ID)
counts_symbol <- counts_ok %>% left_join(lookup_sym, by = "ENTREZ_ID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(GENE_SYM)) %>% select(NAME = GENE_SYM, where(is.numeric))
write_csv(counts_symbol, "counts_symbol.csv")

# 7c  Symbol ↔ Entrez map (custom library) ----------------------------------
lookup_sym %>% rename(NAME = GENE_SYM) %>% write_tsv("id_map_symbol_to_entrez.tsv")

# 7d  Full ID mapping table --------------------------------------------------
map_tbl %>% rename(ENSEMBL_ID = !!id_col) %>% select(ENSEMBL_ID, ENTREZ_ID, GENE_SYM) %>% arrange(ENSEMBL_ID) %>% write_tsv("id_map_full.tsv")

# 7e  Counts + full ID map ---------------------------------------------------
counts_with_map <- counts_mapped %>% rename(ENSEMBL_ID = !!id_col) %>% relocate(ENSEMBL_ID, ENTREZ_ID, GENE_SYM)
write_csv(counts_with_map, "counts_with_full_map.csv")

message("✔ Wrote counts_entrez.csv, counts_symbol.csv, id_map_symbol_to_entrez.tsv, id_map_full.tsv, counts_with_full_map.csv")

## 8  SUMMARY ---------------------------------------------------------------
lib_sizes <- colSums(counts_ok %>% select(where(is.numeric)))
summary_tbl <- tibble(
  Metric = c("Timestamp", "Rows input", "Rows mapped", "Rows unmapped", "Unique Entrez", "Samples", "Mean lib", "Median lib", "Min lib", "Max lib"),
  Value  = c(format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), n_total, n_mapped, n_total - n_mapped, nrow(counts_ok), length(lib_sizes), ifelse(length(lib_sizes), round(mean(lib_sizes),1), NA), ifelse(length(lib_sizes), median(lib_sizes), NA), ifelse(length(lib_sizes), min(lib_sizes), NA), ifelse(length(lib_sizes), max(lib_sizes), NA))
)
write_tsv(summary_tbl, "id_mapping_summary.tsv")
print(summary_tbl, n = nrow(summary_tbl))

```
